name: human-datastream
description: Read-only data interface for Jonathan Lloyd's Human Datastream portfolio. Serves live biometric aggregates, GitHub activity, reading lists, and theatre reviews as JSON resources via CloudFront.

resources.name: Health biometrics
resources.description: Heart rate, HRV, activity, and workout data (7-day aggregates)

resources.name: Sleep data
resources.description: Sleep phases, duration, and efficiency metrics

resources.name: Focus state
resources.description: Current Do Not Disturb and focus mode status

resources.name: GitHub activity
resources.description: Dev activity, languages, contributions, and recent commits

resources.name: Bookshelf
resources.description: Books with status, ratings, progress, and cover images

resources.name: Reading feed
resources.description: Starred articles and RSS feed items

resources.name: Theatre reviews
resources.description: Theatre show reviews with ratings and venue info

resources.name: Workouts
resources.description: Workout sessions with type, duration, and calorie burn

resources.name: Location aggregates
resources.description: Aggregated place summaries and location data
